statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the active roadmap slice as Anton.

Added [Invoke-GarageRestoreAudit.ps1](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/tools/audit/Invoke-GarageRestoreAudit.ps1), a reusable Playwright/Chrome audit for `garage.html#diagnostic-activity`. It verifies Garage backup import/restore behavior with real file input handling: diagnostic handoff rejection, invalid backup rejection, mixed backup preview, valid-section-only restore, photo `dataUrl` stripping, restored area activity filtering, and mobile/desktop no-overflow checks.

Updated Anton memory/docs:
`AGENT_STATE.md`, `AGENT_BACKLOG.md`, `ANTON_ROADMAP.md`, `SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md`, and `ANTON.md`.

Verification passed:
- `powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\tools\audit\Invoke-GarageRestoreAudit.ps1 -Tag audit-v271`
- `powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\tools\audit\Test-InternalLinks.ps1`

Screenshots captured:

- `debug-screenshots/audit-v271-garage-restore-audit-desktop.png`

Next slice recorded: review Garage restore wording and mobile density against a real user backup/export before adding conflict-resolution choices.
